summary: Iteration-7 full E2E regression of new Blog/CMS feature on WorkSoy. Wrote 25 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_blog.py covering public listing, single post (view increment + 404), categories/tags, comments (approved vs spam-guard pending vs invalid email 422), newsletter subscribe (new vs already_subscribed vs invalid), sitemap.xml (includes every published slug + static routes), robots.txt (GPTBot/ChatGPT-User/ClaudeBot/PerplexityBot/Google-Extended Allow rules), admin auth gate (401/403 unauthenticated), admin CRUD (auto-slug + duplicate slug -2 suffix + patch + delete + draft->publish), comment moderation, subscribers list, and AI generate for all 4 modes (meta/summary/keywords/faq) using Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. ALL 25 TESTS PASS in 20.4s. Playwright UI tests verified: /blog renders hero + search + filter pills + cards + newsletter (submit OK, 'You're in' toast); /blog/:slug renders TL;DR + content + comment form (post submit OK, 'Comment posted' toast) + share button + injects exactly 2 JSON-LD scripts (BlogPosting + BreadcrumbList - FAQPage absent because the test post has no FAQ, which is correct conditional behaviour); Journal nav link at index 06 links to /blog; admin CMS via admin-tab-blog shows posts table with 3 seeded + new-post editor opens with TipTap, title + editor + save-draft + publish + 4 AI buttons all present, Save draft -> 'Draft saved' toast, Publish -> 'Published' toast and status flips. All other admin tabs (Vetting/Managed/Leads/Queue/All/Briefs/Disputes/Payouts) still render unbroken.

minor.issue: Underscores are stripped before being normalised to dashes ('TEST_Post' -> 'testpost' instead of 'test-post'). Functionality still works (slug uniqueness + auto-suffix verified) but produces slightly worse SEO slugs from titles containing underscores. Fix: include '_' in the first character class, e.g. re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9\s_-]', '', text).

Status is passed as query-string only (FastAPI `status: str` param); accepting it in the JSON body too would match REST convention and the way the AdminBlogTab UI may submit. Not breaking, just inconsistent.

integration_issues.issue: Typing 'CFO' in blog-search-input returned 0 cards even though 'The Fractional CFO playbook' is a seeded published post (it is the featured hero, but the grid filter should still surface it). Likely the search filter excludes the featured post or matches only excerpt/category. Verify the search input filters across {title, excerpt, tags, category} on both the featured slot and the grid.

issues: Third-party analytics requests to shipper-api-production-3b99.up.railway.app fire on every navigation and ALL are blocked by CORS (No Access-Control-Allow-Origin). Generates 4-6 console errors per page. Either drop the integration, fix the CORS on that endpoint, or wrap the calls so they fail silently. This is the SAME noise carried over from iteration-6.

action_items: MINOR: Fix _slugify (server.py ~line 4893) to treat underscores as separators so titles like 'TEST_Post' produce 'test-post', not 'testpost'.

MEDIUM: Verify /blog search input filters seeded post titles correctly. Search for 'CFO' on /blog should surface 'The Fractional CFO playbook ...' (currently returns 0 grid cards; may be because the post is only in the featured slot and not also in the searchable grid).

LOW: Add a sub-tab pill 'Blog CMS' selectable indicator + visual separation under admin Blog CMS tab — currently the table immediately renders without any breadcrumb showing which tab is active (small UX nit).

LOW: The data-testid 'blog-card-wysiwyg-cms' mentioned in the testing brief does not exist as a slug — only seeded post slugs do (the-fractional-cfo-..., why-we-ditched-hourly-..., the-3-lie-...). Confirm with main agent if 'wysiwyg-cms' was an example placeholder or a missing seed.

REGRESSION/PRE-EXISTING: CORS-blocked external analytics calls to shipper-api-production-3b99.up.railway.app continue to litter console with errors on every page navigation. Remove or proxy this call.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 5485 LOC (was 4984 in iter-6). Blog block alone is ~600 LOC at the bottom. URGENT: split into routers/blog.py + routers/admin_blog.py. The current monolithic file makes diffs and code review increasingly hostile.

/api/admin/blog/ai/generate (server.py:5297) calls anthropic via emergentintegrations synchronously inside the request handler with no timeout / retry / circuit-breaker. A slow Claude response holds the connection for >30s and there is no async cancellation. Consider a background task + a poll endpoint, or at least a request-level timeout.
blog_subscribe (server.py:5098) uses _rate_limit on the same IP bucket as auth — a heavy newsletter signup wave will trip auth login limits too. Give newsletter its own bucket / wider window.

_post_public (server.py:4945) returns the full content_html in the list response — for a 30-post listing this is ~MB of bytes wasted. List endpoint should project only {id, title, slug, excerpt, cover_image, category, tags, reading_time_min, view_count, published_at} and reserve content_html for the detail endpoint.

Single-post GET (server.py:5012) does an unconditional $inc on every request including bots/spiders — view_count is being inflated by sitemap crawl + monitoring. Gate the increment behind a Referer/UA heuristic or rate-limit by IP+slug.

BlogPostIn.faq is typed `List[dict] = []` — replace with `List[FaqItem]` (a Pydantic submodel with `question: str`, `answer: str`) so malformed FAQ payloads 422 instead of silently persisting garbage.

AdminBlogTab + PostEditor + RichEditor: confirm the editor's content is sanitised before persisting (TipTap can produce arbitrary HTML; XSS risk on the public page if an attacker takes over an admin account). Consider bleach/DOMPurify on the server during create/update.

JSON-LD generation lives in BlogPostPage.tsx but the test brief promises `data-blogJsonld='1'` for verification — current implementation uses standard <script type='application/ld+json'> and the tag was NOT observed. Either remove that promise from docs or actually add the data-attribute for testability.

success_rate.backend: 100% (25/25 blog pytest cases pass, including AI claude-sonnet-4-6 for all 4 modes)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical paths (listing, single post, JSON-LD count, comment, newsletter, admin login, admin blog tab, new-post editor, save-draft, publish, regression of other admin tabs); one minor unverified item: /blog search may not filter featured-slot post

test_credentials: admin@worksoy.com / WorkSoyAdmin2026! — verified working via /api/auth/login and via /admin/login UI flow.
seed_data_creation: Per run: ~3 newsletter_subscribers (TEST_ prefix emails), ~3 blog_comments (TEST_Reader, TEST_Spammer, UI Tester), 2 transient blog_posts (TEST UI Draft Post, TEST_Post_xxxxxx) — ALL cleaned up at end of run via admin DELETE; verified 3 seeded posts remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Canonical regression for blog feature: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_blog.py -v` (25 cases, all green in ~20s; AI tests need EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env). The AI tests hit Claude Sonnet 4-6 via emergentintegrations and take 3-8s each. Admin credentials: admin@worksoy.com / WorkSoyAdmin2026!. Three blog posts are seeded with slugs: the-fractional-cfo-playbook-for-startups-under-50-people, why-we-ditched-hourly-the-case-for-milestone-escrow-contracts, the-3-lie-what-toptal-style-vetting-really-filters-for. Public URL: https://wysiwyg-cms.preview.emergentagent.com. JSON-LD scripts on /blog/:slug are 2 (BlogPosting + BreadcrumbList) when FAQ absent, will be 3 when FAQ present. Newsletter subscribe is idempotent (already_subscribed=true on second attempt). Comment status=approved by default, =pending only if body contains http(s):// URL AND body length < 60. Slug generator strips underscores (minor); duplicate slug appends -2 -3 etc.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no product-breaking bugs found. The blog feature ships clean across backend + frontend + admin CMS + AI integration + SEO surfaces (sitemap.xml + robots.txt + JSON-LD). Open minor items documented in action_items + critical_code_review_comments.
